summary: First testing pass on Avani Manoria portfolio (both backend + frontend). Backend contact API and frontend portfolio UI/form flow are fully functional. All 7 backend pytest tests pass (root + contact CRUD + validation). All frontend testids present, hero 3D canvas renders without runtime errors, all sections/skill-cards/project-cards render, navbar links scroll correctly, and contact form validation + submission works end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py: `logger` is used inside `create_contact_message` (line 95) but defined AFTER the routes at line 124. At request time it is available (module fully loaded), but it is stylistically wrong and fragile — move `logging.basicConfig` + `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` above the route definitions.

backend/server.py: `create_contact_message` wraps insert in try/except that swallows Pydantic ValidationError-like paths — however FastAPI validates via response_model / request model before entry, so this is acceptable. Consider not blanket-catching Exception to avoid masking real DB errors.
backend uses `@app.on_event('shutdown')` which is deprecated in favor of FastAPI lifespan — non-blocking, nice-to-have.
Frontend Contact.jsx: relies on HTML5 `required` for empty validation before JS check — good defense-in-depth. All data-testids for the requested elements exist.
Projects.jsx uses external unsplash/pexels image URLs — loads fine but consider self-hosting for production reliability.
seed_data_creation: Created ~4 TEST_-prefixed contact messages in MongoDB collection `contact_messages` via automated tests (backend pytest + Playwright UI submission). These are harmless test records with the TEST_ prefix for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite lives at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — 7 tests covering /api/, POST /api/contact (valid, no-subject, invalid email 422, missing name 422, empty message 422) and GET /api/contact/messages. Frontend flow verified via Playwright against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Contact form validation happens client-side via HTML5 `required` + a JS trim check that fires a toast without hitting backend. To reproduce empty-submit test you must remove `required` and set form.noValidate = true (already done in the test script). All data-testids requested by the review exist: hero-3d-canvas, hero-title, site-navbar, nav-logo, nav-links, nav-link-{about,craft,work,journey,contact}, {about,skills,projects,experience,contact}-section, site-footer, skill-card-{software-engineering,system-design,applied-ai,automation}, project-card (x4), project-cta-0..3, contact-form, contact-input-{name,email,subject,message}, contact-submit-button.
rca of the issue: No bugs found; nothing to RCA.
